entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The cereal crop evaluated for stay-green traits and leaf senescence patterns

entities.name: LEAF SENESCENCE
entities.description: The process of leaf aging and death, which the study aims to delay to increase production

entities.name: STAY-GREEN
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain green leaves and delay senescence

entities.name: PERCENT GREEN LEAF AREA (% GLA)
entities.description: A quantitative measure used to estimate the extent and pattern of leaf senescence

entities.name: DROUGHT ESCAPE
entities.description: A survival strategy where a plant completes its life cycle before the onset of severe drought

entities.name: EARLY FLOWERING
entities.description: The trait of flowering early in the growth cycle, contributing to drought escape

entities.name: LATE FLOWERING
entities.description: The trait of flowering late in the growth cycle

entities.name: REPLICATED FIELD EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: The experimental design used to evaluate sorghum genotypes across different seasons

entities.name: VISUAL SCORING
entities.description: The process of visually assessing leaf senescence at weekly intervals

entities.name: LOGISTIC FUNCTIONS
entities.description: Mathematical models used to determine leaf senescence patterns from % GLA data

entities.name: LINEAR FUNCTIONS
entities.description: Mathematical models used to determine leaf senescence patterns from % GLA data

entities.name: CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: The statistical method used to group genotypes based on their % GLA estimates

entities.name: WATER-LIMITED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions characterized by insufficient water availability

entities.name: POST-RAINY SEASONS
entities.description: The specific seasonal timing during which the field experiments were conducted

entities.name: STRESS
entities.description: Environmental pressure, specifically drought, affecting plant development and senescence

entities.name: CEREAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The overall output of cereal crops, which can be increased by delaying leaf senescence

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL CROPS RESEARCH INSTITUTE FOR SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The research institution where the sorghum evaluation experiments were conducted

relationships.description: used to group genotypes based on

relationships.source: INTERNATIONAL CROPS RESEARCH INSTITUTE FOR SEMI-ARID TROPICS
